name: cookshare
description: CookShare recipe sharing service — pnpm monorepo

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cookshare/shared run build && pnpm --filter @cookshare/backend run build && pnpm --filter @cookshare/frontend run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @cookshare/shared run build && pnpm --parallel --filter @cookshare/backend --filter @cookshare/frontend run dev
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm --filter @cookshare/shared run build && pnpm --filter @cookshare/backend run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: pnpm --filter @cookshare/shared run build && pnpm --filter @cookshare/frontend run dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @cookshare/shared run build && pnpm --filter @cookshare/backend exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @cookshare/frontend exec tsc --noEmit
